title: Garlicky Crumbly King Prawn Slovakian Crockpot Creme Fraîche
description: This gluten-free dish features raw king prawns simmered in a savory creme fraiche sauce with garlic and herbs, perfect for a solo dinner or light meal.

ingredients.name: crockpot sauce base (store-bought or homemade)
ingredients.notes: approx. 150g creme fraiche and 25ml heavy cream combined with salt and pepper to taste

ingredients.name: chopped fresh herbs
ingredients.amount: to taste, such as parsley, chives, thyme

instructions: Clean and devein the king prawns. Pat them dry with paper towels.
Heat a tablespoon of unsalted butter in a casserole dish over medium heat.
Add minced garlic to the hot butter and sauté until fragrant, about 1-2 minutes.
Gently toss in the cleaned king prawns and add the crockpot sauce base. Stir well.
Cover with a lid and simmer for 5-7 minutes or until the prawns are fully cooked but still have a pink hue (internal temperature of about 63°C).
Season with freshly chopped herbs to taste, adjust salt and pepper as necessary.
